instruction: The portfolio project in ~/Desktop/portfolio_handoff/ needs a full handoff migration. Read HANDOFF.json to get the new owner information and docs URL. Then use VS Code to update site_config.json so the site title, owner, and contactEmail match the handoff, create a backup named site_config.json.bak, and repair build_signature.py so the provided tests pass. Open the docsUrl from the handoff in Chrome while you work, and finally create MIGRATION_DONE.txt containing exactly `portfolio handoff complete`.

parameters.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
base = Path('/home/user/Desktop/portfolio_handoff')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
json.dump({'title': 'Ava Portfolio', 'owner': 'Ava Lin', 'contactEmail': 'ava.lin@example.com', 'docsUrl': 'https://docs.github.com/en/pages'}, open(base / 'HANDOFF.json', 'w'), indent=2)
json.dump({'title': 'Old Portfolio', 'owner': 'Old Owner', 'contactEmail': 'old@example.com'}, open(base / 'site_config.json', 'w'), indent=2)
(base / 'build_signature.py').write_text("""def build_signature(name, email):
    return f'{email} - {name}'
""")
(base / 'test.py').write_text("""from build_signature import build_signature

def test():
    assert build_signature('Ava Lin', 'ava.lin@example.com') == 'Ava Lin <ava.lin@example.com>'
""")
PY
